title: Observability
description: Grafana, VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs, and Alloy for metrics and system log ingestion

env.name: VL_MAX_DISK_GB
env.label: Logs Max Disk Usage GB (0 = unlimited)

env.name: GRAFANA_ROOT_URL
env.label: Grafana Root URL (only when behind a reverse proxy)

env.name: HOST_HOSTNAME
env.label: Host Label (host label on all metrics/logs)

env.name: VM_BIND_IP
env.label: VictoriaMetrics Bind IP (WireGuard IP for remote agents)

env.name: VLOGS_BIND_IP
env.label: VictoriaLogs Bind IP (WireGuard IP for remote agents)

note: Deploys 4 containers: grafana, victoriametrics, victorialogs, alloy. Alloy mounts /var/log, /proc, /sys, / (read-only) and the docker socket to collect host metrics, docker logs, and system logs (auth, syslog, kernel). See stacks/observability/README.md for the full guide.
